description: Fabricated and futuristic foods from sci-fi settings.
foods: A bland efficient tube of everything the body needs and nothing the tongue wants.
Extruded layer by layer from a food printer, shaped to look like a roast but tasting slightly off.
Vacuum-sealed greens grown under artificial light, crisp and clean and faintly metallic.
A dense tasteless block that sustains a crew member for a full shift, chewed more than enjoyed.
Engineered to taste like a fruit that went extinct centuries ago, close enough to fool most people.
A flash-frozen concentrate thawed into a bitter stimulant, the fuel of every night watch.
